channel.title: Space Quotes — Tidbits
channel.description: Sourced tidbits from real FCC, ITU and FAA space filings, paired with space quotes.

item.title: AST SpaceMobile just told the FCC exactly how its giant satellites will fall out of the sky
item.description: On February 20, 2026, AST & Science, LLC (AST SpaceMobile) filed a supplement in FCC docket 25-201 detailing how it will dispose of its satellites at end of …

item.title: Planet Labs backs the FCC's push to make licensing satellites less of a slog
item.description: On February 19, 2026, Planet Labs PBC filed reply comments in FCC docket 25-306 strongly supporting the Commission's effort to "modernize and streamline its …

item.title: Starcloud is filing the paperwork for a data center in orbit
item.description: On February 2, 2026, Starcloud, Inc. filed an FCC satellite-network document with an unusually literal name: a cost-recovery declaration for the Starcloud Or…

item.title: Amazon wants the FCC to rewrite satellite-spectrum rules set when Ka-band was 'in its infancy'
item.description: On January 29, 2026, Kuiper Systems LLC — the Amazon satellite venture now permanently branded Amazon Leo — filed a letter in FCC docket 25-157, the Moderniz…

item.title: Rural carriers tell the FCC: don't let satellites beam over our spectrum without permission
item.description: On November 18, 2025, the Competitive Carriers Association (CCA) filed an opposition in FCC docket 25-201 against the applications of AST & Science, AT&T, Ve…

item.title: SpaceX tells the FCC to throw out EchoStar's challenge to its direct-to-cell waiver
item.description: On April 23, 2025, SpaceX filed an opposition in FCC docket 23-135 urging the Commission to deny EchoStar's Application for Review. EchoStar had asked the FC…

item.title: Astroscale asks the FCC to license an in-space refueling demonstration
item.description: On December 23, 2024, Astroscale U.S. Inc. filed an FCC satellite license application (SAT-LOA-20241223-00298) for an unusual kind of spacecraft: not a commu…

item.title: Amazon urges the FCC to open the 17 GHz band for satellite broadband
item.description: On September 24, 2024, Kuiper Systems LLC — Amazon's satellite venture — filed an ex parte letter urging the FCC to adopt its Draft Report and Order authoriz…

item.title: Iridium asks the FCC to set a hard, NASA-based limit on satellites blowing up in orbit
item.description: On June 24, 2024, Iridium filed a letter in FCC docket 18-313 — Mitigation of Orbital Debris in the New Space Age — urging the Commission to do something it …

item.title: Aethero wants to launch a satellite just to prove a computer can run in orbit
item.description: On March 11, 2024, Aethero Space Inc. filed an FCC satellite license application for a new space station with an unusually narrow purpose. In the application…
